title: Agentic Confidence Calibration

openreview.observed_response: The OpenReview API returned HTTP 403. The forum endpoint returned a Cloudflare Turnstile page requiring interactive verification; no forum content was exposed. No OpenReview record, reviews, rebuttals, decision, or accepted-version PDF was preserved or treated as inspected evidence.

source_archive_inspection.boundary: The arXiv source archive was preserved as paper source evidence. A targeted inspection of the README and main TeX found no official repository or dataset-release URL; this is not a complete release search.

checks: arXiv API returned immutable v1 metadata and an abstract without a withdrawal or retraction notice
PDF metadata reports the expected title, complete three-author byline, 37 pages, and 9,992,083 bytes
layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and readable from title and abstract through Appendix A.11 and the final page
the extraction contains 37 form-feed page boundaries, 2,179 lines, and no NUL bytes
the source archive is a readable gzip-compressed arXiv submission containing the main TeX, bibliography, figures, and style files

claim_boundary: This acquisition creates full-text and source-archive evidence only. It is not a deep review. The OpenReview acceptance record remains unverified locally, and no claim is made about calibration validity, interpretability, causal diagnosis, universal transfer, decision utility, professional validity, safety, production fitness, or readiness.
